History
About Us
North End Kitchen & Bar is a chic dining destination in historic Roswell, GA on Canton Street. The restaurant serves modern Southern cuisine, craft cocktails & wine with both indoor and outdoor dining. Open daily for dinner.
Call Us
When We're Open
Hours
Sunday-Thursday
4:00pm to 9:30pm
Friday & Saturday
4:00pm to 9:30pm
Call Us
Book a table
Experience
North End Kitchen
Events for any occasion.
North End is the perfect spot to enjoy a date night out, dinner with friends or drinks at our open-air bar. Featuring a patio & fire pit, it is the place to relax and enjoy delicious Southern cuisine and cocktails on a beautiful night in Roswell.
Free parking is available behind the restaurant.
